questions.question: What is the format of all cases recorded under the PAMC format?
questions.explanation: The PAMC format for case files is uniform and includes a case number in the format of year-sequence.
questions.adaptation_reason: This question targets prior weak topics and mistakes from previous sessions.

options.A: To record all cases under a uniform format
options.B: To classify cases as open, classified, or declassified
options.C: To track the location of cases
